phase-02-5.title: Docker sandbox + cheap pre-filter + regression-safety gate
phase-02-5.note: Clean first-round PASS. Contract APPROVED Round 1 by a properly-forked Evaluator subagent (zero blocking issues, 2 advisories: C6 dual-call mock subtlety and C3/C4 timeout-path exemption from docker-ps check). Single implementation commit `5bf884d` shipped `src/trine_eval/sandbox/` package (3 modules): `docker.py` (`run_in_sandbox` + `SandboxResult`, `--network=none` default-deny, `--rm` always, `--cpus`/`--memory` limits, label-based `docker ps` leftover check, `subprocess.TimeoutExpired` -> `timed_out=True` + `exit_code=-1`); `prefilter.py` (`run_prefilter` + `PrefilterResult` with `stage`/`passed`/`reason`/`stdout`/`stderr`, four-stage ruff->mypy->ast-diff->pytest pipeline with short-circuit on first failure verified via call-count assertion); `regression_gate.py` (`evaluate_regression_gate` + `RegressionGateResult` with pre/post-patch test status capture, FAIL_TO_PASS positive verification, PASS_TO_PASS regression detection, trivial-pass-bypass catcher). 12 new tests under `tests/sandbox/` (all `subprocess.run` patched per SN3). Total 101 tests passing (89 prior + 12 new); 89-test regression suite all green via the `( [ EC=0 ] || [ EC=100 ] )` disjunction. SN1 commit-scoped diff with `S04BASE=git log --grep='complete sprint 04 (Phase 2)' -1` anchor PASSES on current branch. Rubric scores: methodology 4/5, grading 4/5, separation 5/5 (no fallback penalty this sprint — Sprint 4's penalty was scoped to that sprint), context 4/5, extensibility 4/5. Eval at `.harness/evals/phase-02/sprint-05-r1.md`.

phase-02-4.title: LLM-as-judge: CoT rubric, binary scores, bootstrap CI, three-tier grading, calibration
phase-02-4.note: Clean first-round PASS. Contract negotiation hit max rounds (2): Round 1 NEEDS REVISION with 2 BLOCKING (SN1 merge-base baseline predated Phase 2 — widened sprint-0[123]*.md glob now matches sprint-03.md and fails the diff against main; C7 bootstrap-variance OR-disjunction admitted a trivially-broken (0.0,1.0) bootstrap) + 1 ADVISORY (C13 Score.reasoning vs Score.explanation ambiguity). Round 1 review was main-thread fallback (Process Note in contract) — two Evaluator subagent dispatches investigated thoroughly but ran out of turns before writing the review section. Generator's Round 2 revision fixed all three: SN1 now uses commit-scoped diff iterating over `(sprint-04)`-prefixed commits scoped via `S03BASE=git log --grep='complete sprint 03 (Phase 2)' -1` to exclude historical Phase-1 sprint-04 commits; C7 added clause (d) requiring `ci_10.lower != ci_1000.lower OR ci_10.upper != ci_1000.upper`; C13 clause (e) inlined `Score.reasoning OR Score.explanation` acceptance. Round 2 forked Evaluator review APPROVED. Two implementation commits (97f60fa..b39c2f7): added `Score.reasoning: str | None = None` field to Sprint 1's score.py, then created `src/trine_eval/judge/` package (rubric.py with `model_graded_qa` @scorer-registered + binary verdict parser + _COT_PROMPT_TEMPLATE embedding criterion+golden_answer; calibration.py with `compute_tpr_tnr` returning (TP/(TP+FN), TN/(TN+FP)); bootstrap.py with `BootstrapCI` NamedTuple + percentile estimator; dispatch.py with `dispatch_score` reading scorer.tier and routing code/model/human with NO auto-escalation; queue.py with in-memory `ListQueue`+singleton). 50-item synthetic calibration fixture at `tests/fixtures/calibration/items.jsonl` (25 positive + 25 negative). 11 new tests under `tests/judge/`; 78-test regression suite all green (89 total). Round-1 main-thread fallback penalty: generator_evaluator_separation 3/5 instead of 5/5. Eval at `.harness/evals/phase-02/sprint-04-r1.md`.

phase-02-3.title: Prompt caching and Batch API
phase-02-3.note: Round 1 PARTIAL (95/100, 3/3 gates) — C9 FAIL only: contract gap where C9's [ EC = 0 ] guard didn't anticipate Sprint 2's pytest plugin exit-100 override from test_plugin_exit.py (all 41 tests passed, EC=100). Contract negotiation hit max rounds (2) with new SN1 self-match flaw surfacing in Round 2; Generator fixed as fix(sprint-03): ebc1fd2 (narrow Phase-2 glob to sprint-0[12]*.md) before any source landed. Round 2 PASS after fix(sprint-03): 0e1db3f changed C9's exit-code check to disjunction ( [ EC = 0 ] || [ EC = 100 ] ); contract-only fix (no source change, verified via git diff --stat). Seven commits (ebc1fd2..0e1db3f) delivered: apply_cache_control helper (system/tools/examples breakpoints with EPHEMERAL constant, examples documented as library-internal pop-and-prepend key), batch runner (single batches.create call, custom_id=sample.id, polling loop on processing_status, demux via id_to_sample map, EvalLog with batch_id+via metadata), and 8 new tests covering G1+G2+F6 (cache_control on system/tools/examples; batch submit-and-demux; batch polling; batch carries cache_control; thinking-block byte-identical round-trip through batch). Total 41 tests under tests/runner/ + tests/models/. Eval at .harness/evals/phase-02/sprint-03-r2.md.

phase-02-2.title: Runner, replayable logs, pytest plugin, observability
phase-02-2.note: First clean first-round PASS since early Phase 1. Contract negotiation hit max rounds (2) with Round 2 NEEDS REVISION (C9 exit-mask + C2 advisory). Generator fixed both as fix(sprint-02): 682c7f1 before any source landed. 11 implementation commits (682c7f1..8a17ea3): async runner with hard caps (token/time/cost/concurrency), binary+JSON replayable log format, deterministic seeds, OTel+Langfuse, pytest plugin (exit 100), token-efficiency metrics, CLI score/report subcommands, ops/langfuse-compose.yaml, sprint-state phase-qualifier docs. 78 tests passing (29 new for Sprint 2). Eval at .harness/evals/phase-02/sprint-02-r1.md.

phase-02-1.title: Python library bootstrap + core primitives
phase-02-1.note: Round 1 FAIL on SN1 only (all 11 success criteria PASS, 100%): SN1's broad .harness/evals/sprint-*.md glob matched sprint-00-*.md Phase 2 files from prior sprint. Round 2 PASS after fix 39a5ae7: narrowed eval glob to sprint-0[1-9]*.md and sprint-1*.md (matches contracts glob).

0.note: Round 1 FAIL on C4 (Python subprocess shell=True routed through cmd.exe on Windows). Round 2 PASS after fix bf30c09/b54a478: explicit Git Bash path with subprocess.run([bash,'-c',...]).
